message:
refactor(serve): remove ~1k lines of unused API handlers, harden JobStore, fix sanitizeRequestID

Massive server cleanup:

Removed ~15 unused/duplicate API handlers (~1,065 lines deleted):
- handleAgentRouteV1, handleAgentActivityV1, handleAgentHealthV1,
  handleAgentContextV1, handleAgentRestartV1
- handleMetricsV1, handleMetricsCompareV1, handleMetricsExportV1,
  handleMetricsSnapshotSaveV1, handleMetricsSnapshotListV1
- handleAnalyticsV1, handleContextBuildV1, handleContextGetV1,
  handleContextStatsV1, handleContextCacheClearV1
- handleGitSyncV1, handleGitStatusV1
- handleOutputTailV1, handleOutputDiffV1, handleOutputFilesV1,
  handleOutputSummaryV1
- handlePaletteV1, handleHistoryV1, handleHistoryStatsV1,
  handleRouteV1, handleWaitV1
- Associated request structs removed

Hardening:
- JobStore Create/Get/List return cloned jobs via cloneJob() to
  prevent data races from shared pointer access
- sanitizeRequestID: colons replaced with dots (was pass-through)
- handleAgentWaitV1: default poll 300ms->500ms, add CountN/
  RequireTransition defaults, early-return on non-zero exit
- handlePaneOutputV1: minor variable rename

Tests (server_test.go, handler_branch_test.go):
- sanitizeRequestID colon test updated
- Capabilities endpoint field names corrected
- JWT test kid format fixed
- WebSocket test refactored (renamed client, removed sleep)
- handleAgentWaitV1 test accepts SESSION_NOT_FOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
